name: the detector check manifest stays in sync with the promoted rule ids
command: ok=1; for id in $(grep -hoE 'g-[a-z-]+' $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/aws/*-iac-enforcement.yaml $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/security-governance/*-iac-enforcement.yaml | grep -E '^g-(aws|security-governance)-' | sort -u); do grep -q "\"$id\"" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/cloud-guidance-rules.json" || ok=0; done; [ "$ok" = 1 ] && echo manifest-in-sync 1>&2
